overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character walks along urban sidewalks beneath overhead transit structures, crosses an intersection at M Ebunike street, and continues through a bustling downtown area lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated transit structure

events.description: pedestrian in white tank top passes close to camera on the right
black sedan drives past on the street to the left
slight right turn to navigate around pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an overhead transit bridge, observing street activity and passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos walking toward camera
dark colored car driving down the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large metal bridge structure carrying elevated transit lines above the street
building facade with large praying hands graffiti and text reading SANTISIMA MUERTE
tall wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires
illuminated yellow signage on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive overhead transit bridge in a dense urban environment. The camera passes a distinctive building with a 'SANTISIMA MUERTE' mural on the right while cars drive by on the left. Pedestrians walk in both directions, and the scene is lit by bright midday sun casting strong shadows.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk curb and enters the crosswalk at M Ebunike intersection
traffic light shows green while crossing the street with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from the right sidewalk to the left side

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading M Ebunike mounted on a pole
vertical traffic signal showing green light
painted white stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up at the M Ebunike intersection as the camera crosses the street. A red street sign marks the location while the traffic light shows green. The overhead transit bridge recedes into the distance as palm trees become visible on the far side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with construction barriers

events.description: fade from black reveals new street section with palm trees and construction barriers
passing yellow construction barriers and trash bags lining the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past palm trees and construction areas, following pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: person in red patterned jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
white van and other vehicles driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking off part of the sidewalk
building with bright yellow lower facade and teal awning
futuristic high-rise buildings with glass facades and large billboards

segments.scene_description: After a brief transition, the scene resumes on a sunlit downtown street lined with palm trees. The camera walks past construction barriers and trash bags on the right while tall glass towers rise in the distance. The sidewalk is busier with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and traffic flows steadily along the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving through a dense, sun-drenched urban corridor beneath a massive transit structure. It begins with a steady walk along a concrete sidewalk, where the bright midday sun casts sharp, high-contrast shadows across the path. As the camera advances, it passes a distinctive building featuring a Santisima Muerte mural on the right while traffic flows steadily on the left. The scene maintains its momentum through the bustling environment, weaving past pedestrians moving in both directions under the oppressive scale of the overhead bridge.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a transit-shaded intersection into a bright, bustling downtown corridor. It begins as the camera crosses the M Ebunike intersection under a green traffic light, passing a red street sign while the overhead transit bridge recedes into the distance. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens up to reveal a sunlit street lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers. The scene then shifts toward a more crowded urban atmosphere, gliding past construction barriers and trash bags on the sidewalk. Finally, the camera continues its path through a steady flow of pedestrians and multi-lane traffic, deepening the immersion into the dense city center.
